hannina:UnionPower.NAME: Form
DESCRIPTIONS: When in Ironclad Cat Form, gain #b2 #yStrength . NL #yComposite cards become the corresponding #rRed cards recorded within them.
When in Silent Cat Form, gain #b2 #yDexterity . NL #yComposite cards become the corresponding #gGreen cards recorded within them.
When in Defect Cat Form, Channel 1 #yLightning and gain #b1 #yFocus . NL #yComposite cards become the corresponding #bBlue cards recorded within them.
When in Watcher Cat Form, #yScry #b2 . NL #yComposite cards become the corresponding #pPurple cards recorded within them.
NL Automatically exits at the end of the turn.
